narration: What if your choices are more predictable than you think?
visual_description: Hook visual: What if your choices are more predictable than you think?
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: What if your choices are more predictable than you think?
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: What if your choices are more predictable than you think?

narration: Prospect theory explains how we evaluate potential losses and gains differently.
visual_description: Context visual: Prospect theory explains how we evaluate potential losses and gains differently.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Prospect theory explains how we evaluate potential losses and gains differently.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Prospect theory explains how we evaluate potential losses and gains differently.

narration: We fear losses more than we value gains. Think about it—why do we hesitate to invest?
visual_description: Escalation visual: We fear losses more than we value gains. Think about it—why do we hesitate to invest?
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: We fear losses more than we value gains. Think about it—why do we hesitate to invest?
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: We fear losses more than we value gains. Think about it—why do we hesitate to invest?

narration: Studies show we’d rather avoid losing $100 than gain $150. That’s powerful.
visual_description: Evidence visual: Studies show we’d rather avoid losing $100 than gain $150. That’s powerful.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: Studies show we’d rather avoid losing $100 than gain $150. That’s powerful.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: Studies show we’d rather avoid losing $100 than gain $150. That’s powerful.

narration: Understanding this helps us make better decisions. Are you ready to rethink your choices?
